messages.content: holaaaa
lets plan a trip to USA

USA it is! 🇺🇸 So what kind of trip are we thinking?
Chill vacation, adventure, family trip vibes? Prenala, your thoughts? 👀
texas trip, but kinda friends coded

Texas with the friends, got it! What kind of vibe are we going for?
@prenalalwani556, your thoughts here?
chill vibe but we are broke
friends trip

Okay, intercity trip, got it! 🚗
So how many people are we planning this for? @prenalalwani556 what's your take?
its just her and i

Got it, just the two of you!
How long are we thinking for this trip? @prenalalwani556 your call matters here 😄
week trip would be enough

Got it, 7 days is locked in!
When are we thinking of going for this trip? @prenalalwani556 your call here too 😄
han, prena whats your call in that
What dates are we thinking for this trip? Prenal, what dates are you leaning towards?
after eid maybe

Got it, after Eid works! 🌙
Now, where are we thinking of crashing? Hotels, hostels, or something else?
broke so hostelsss

Hostels it is! We'll make those dollars stretch 😂
What kind of activities are we thinking for our broke but ballin' trip?
as it is texas i will try bull ridee and cow boy activitesssss

Yesss, cowboy activities and bull riding it is! 🤠
Love that energy! How are we getting around Texas?
flightssss
FLIGHTS IT IS! ✈️ Okay, where are we taking this adventure though?? 🔥
texasss here we come
